description: Google Play Billing 을 위한 Capacitor 커스텀 Kotlin 플러그인 구현. frontend `payment.ts:startPaymentPlayBilling` 이 호출하는 `window.Capacitor.Plugins.Billing.purchase({productId})` 의 native 구현체. backend `verifyPlayBilling` 5단계 검증과 RTDN webhook 은 이미 구현됨. mobile/android/ 네이티브 코드만 추가.

steps.name: gradle-kotlin-billing-dependencies
steps.description: mobile/android/variables.gradle 에 kotlinVersion + playBillingVersion 상수 추가. mobile/android/build.gradle buildscript dependencies 에 kotlin-gradle-plugin classpath 추가. mobile/android/app/build.gradle 에 kotlin-android plugin + kotlin-stdlib + com.android.billingclient:billing-ktx 의존성 추가.

steps.name: billing-plugin-kotlin
steps.description: mobile/android/app/src/main/java/com/sqldpass/app/BillingPlugin.kt 작성 — @CapacitorPlugin(name="Billing") + BillingClient + PurchasesUpdatedListener. purchase(productId) → queryProductDetailsAsync → launchBillingFlow → JSObject(success, purchaseToken, orderId) 응답. MainActivity.java 의 onCreate 에 registerPlugin(BillingPlugin.class) 1줄 추가.
